/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/CameraDriver/MindVisionCamera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/Communication/ByteConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/Communication/CRC16.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/Communication/VirtualSerial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/ImgProcessing/BeanSvmClassifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/ImgProcessing/TaskPlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/ImgProcessing/VisionTypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/ImgProcessing/VisionSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/ImgProcessing/YoloOrtDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/src/Tool/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logistics_vision.dir/main.cpp.o -o logistics_vision  -Wl,-rpath,/home/zst/onnxruntime/lib:/home/zst/linuxSDK/lib/x64:/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 /home/zst/onnxruntime/lib/libonnxruntime.so /home/zst/linuxSDK/lib/x64/libMVSDK.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.5 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.5.5
